calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-04-2024 Continued To Jul-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mazen Salfiti appeared by zoom for Greg Yee.

Mr. Salfiti stated that he has seen the tentative ruling. The court noted that the waiver of account needed to be filed by Greg Yee as administrator of the Estate of Diana Yee and that notice to the Victim Compensation Board is required. Mr. Salfiti stated that he was not aware that the Probate Code was revised and that none of the heirs have been previously confined. The First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to July 9, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A revised waiver, a supplement and any additional papers are to be filed by July 2, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.
